title: Filipino Creamy Pudding
description: A simple dessert inspired by the Philippines, featuring a creamy pudding topped with a crunchy cookie crust.
instructions: Crush 1 cup of cookies in a bowl.
Mix 2 tablespoons of sugar and 0.5 teaspoon of vanilla extract into the crushed cookies.
Press the cookie mixture into the bottom of a baking dish.
Bake the cookie crust for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix the pudding package with 1 cup of water.
Add 1 cup of thick cream and 1 tablespoon of Filipino sauce into the pudding mixture. Mix well.
Pour the pudding mixture into the baked cookie crust.
Chill the dessert in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
Top with crushed cookies and serve.
